PostcodesioR v0.3.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction
  • Changelog

Random postcode

Source: R/random_postcode.R
random_postcode.Rd

Returns a random postcode and all available data for that postcode.

random_postcode(outcode = NULL)

Arguments

outcode

A string. Filters random postcodes by outcode. Returns null if invalid outcode. Optional.

Value

A list with a random postcode with corresponding characteristics.

See also

postcode_lookup for documentation.

Examples

# \donttest{
random_postcode()

#> $postcode
#> [1] "GU29 0DJ"
#> 
#> $quality
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $eastings
#> [1] 489633
#> 
#> $northings
#> [1] 117979
#> 
#> $country
#> [1] "England"
#> 
#> $nhs_ha
#> [1] "South East Coast"
#> 
#> $longitude
#> [1] -0.725245
#> 
#> $latitude
#> [1] 50.95428
#> 
#> $european_electoral_region
#> [1] "South East"
#> 
#> $primary_care_trust
#> [1] "West Sussex"
#> 
#> $region
#> [1] "South East"
#> 
#> $lsoa
#> [1] "Chichester 004F"
#> 
#> $msoa
#> [1] "Chichester 004"
#> 
#> $incode
#> [1] "0DJ"
#> 
#> $outcode
#> [1] "GU29"
#> 
#> $parliamentary_constituency
#> [1] "Chichester"
#> 
#> $admin_district
#> [1] "Chichester"
#> 
#> $parish
#> [1] "Heyshott"
#> 
#> $admin_county
#> [1] "West Sussex"
#> 
#> $admin_ward
#> [1] "Easebourne"
#> 
#> $ced
#> [1] "Rother Valley"
#> 
#> $ccg
#> [1] "NHS West Sussex"
#> 
#> $nuts
#> [1] "West Sussex (South West)"
#> 
#> $codes
#> $codes$admin_district
#> [1] "E07000225"
#> 
#> $codes$admin_county
#> [1] "E10000032"
#> 
#> $codes$admin_ward
#> [1] "E05011671"
#> 
#> $codes$parish
#> [1] "E04009907"
#> 
#> $codes$parliamentary_constituency
#> [1] "E14000633"
#> 
#> $codes$ccg
#> [1] "E38000248"
#> 
#> $codes$ccg_id
#> [1] "70F"
#> 
#> $codes$ced
#> [1] "E58001650"
#> 
#> $codes$nuts
#> [1] "TLJ27"
#> 
#> $codes$lsoa
#> [1] "E01032717"
#> 
#> $codes$msoa
#> [1] "E02006564"
#> 
#> $codes$lau2
#> [1] "E07000225"
#> 
#> 
random_postcode("N1")

#> $postcode
#> [1] "N1 3DH"
#> 
#> $quality
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $eastings
#> [1] 532653
#> 
#> $northings
#> [1] 183818
#> 
#> $country
#> [1] "England"
#> 
#> $nhs_ha
#> [1] "London"
#> 
#> $longitude
#> [1] -0.088716
#> 
#> $latitude
#> [1] 51.53769
#> 
#> $european_electoral_region
#> [1] "London"
#> 
#> $primary_care_trust
#> [1] "Islington"
#> 
#> $region
#> [1] "London"
#> 
#> $lsoa
#> [1] "Islington 018C"
#> 
#> $msoa
#> [1] "Islington 018"
#> 
#> $incode
#> [1] "3DH"
#> 
#> $outcode
#> [1] "N1"
#> 
#> $parliamentary_constituency
#> [1] "Islington South and Finsbury"
#> 
#> $admin_district
#> [1] "Islington"
#> 
#> $parish
#> [1] "Islington, unparished area"
#> 
#> $admin_county
#> NULL
#> 
#> $admin_ward
#> [1] "St Peter's"
#> 
#> $ced
#> NULL
#> 
#> $ccg
#> [1] "NHS North Central London"
#> 
#> $nuts
#> [1] "Haringey and Islington"
#> 
#> $codes
#> $codes$admin_district
#> [1] "E09000019"
#> 
#> $codes$admin_county
#> [1] "E99999999"
#> 
#> $codes$admin_ward
#> [1] "E05000380"
#> 
#> $codes$parish
#> [1] "E43000209"
#> 
#> $codes$parliamentary_constituency
#> [1] "E14000764"
#> 
#> $codes$ccg
#> [1] "E38000240"
#> 
#> $codes$ccg_id
#> [1] "93C"
#> 
#> $codes$ced
#> [1] "E99999999"
#> 
#> $codes$nuts
#> [1] "TLI43"
#> 
#> $codes$lsoa
#> [1] "E01002798"
#> 
#> $codes$msoa
#> [1] "E02000571"
#> 
#> $codes$lau2
#> [1] "E09000019"
#> 
#> 
# }
